raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 373 aims to improve safeguards for nonpublic school students in California.",
    "Senate Bill 373 passed unanimously out of the Assembly Education Committee.",
    "Certified Nonpublic Schools serve public school students with disabilities whose needs cannot be met in a traditional classroom.",
    "Under the IEP process, students with disabilities can be placed in institutions with troubling safety records.",
    "Nearly 300 California students with disabilities remain in out-of-state placements today.",
    "Students in out-of-state placements are often far from home and without the same level of oversight provided to other youth.",
    "Senator Shannon Grove's legislation aims to ensure the safety, well-being, and dignity of students in out-of-state nonpublic schools.",
    "Senate Bill 373 is framed as a critical step to strengthen protections for vulnerable children sent to out-of-state schools by their school district."
  ]
}
```
